name: OpenAI
summary: OpenAI was founded in 2015 as a nonprofit AI research lab with the mission to ensure artificial general intelligence benefits all of humanity. It transitioned to a capped-profit structure in 2019. Under Sam Altman's leadership, OpenAI developed the GPT series of language models and launched ChatGPT in November 2022, triggering a global AI arms race. OpenAI is arguably the single most influential organization in bringing AI capabilities to mainstream public awareness and commercial adoption.
